A 100

BEST WESTERN OCEAN BEACH HOTEL AND SUITES

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: September 24, 2025

BEST WESTERN OCEAN BEACH HOTEL AND SUITES is a Other restaurant at 5600 N ATLANTIC AVE in Cocoa Beach, Brevard County, in Central Florida. At its most recent health inspection on September 24, 2025, it received a grade of A with a score of 100 out of 100. Inspectors recorded no outstanding violations. By health score, it is safer than 100% of Brevard County restaurants. Diners give it an average rating of 4.1 stars across 3143 reviews. Typical prices fall in the $94 range.

Inspections trending: stable · last inspected 276 days ago

Get directions Call (321) 783-7621
